title: Legal notice

body: All content available on this website, including text, graphics, logos, visuals and interface components, is protected by intellectual property laws.
Any reproduction, representation, adaptation or use, in whole or in part, without prior written authorization is prohibited.

liability.title: Liability
body: The publisher strives to provide information that is as accurate as possible, but cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the published content.
Use of the website is at the user's own risk.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable law
body: This legal notice is governed by French law.
In the event of a dispute, and unless mandatory legal provisions provide otherwise, French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
